LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED THAT MISS BLISS WAS A FORMER ASSOCIATE WITH THE LAW FIRM OF HOWARD AND RICE WHERE HE PRACTICED LAW EIGHT YEARS AGO AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT CONTINUED TO GIVE ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON THE MATTER. OBJECTION WAS MADE BY MR. BONNER AND EXCERCISED HIS CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH.
